mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-iborderddln-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderDt - 입고 마감 상세 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY IBHDKEY, CAST(IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC)
mapper.sql: /* wms-inbound-iborderddln-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderPlcmsql - 입고 마감 적치 조회 SQL */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.IBCFSEQNO , A.SEQNO , COALESCE(B.ASRTMASICKEY, A.ICKEY) AS ASRTMASICKEY , COALESCE(D.ICNM, C.ICNM) AS ASRTMASICNM , CASE WHEN B.ASRTDTICKEY IS NOT NULL THEN A.ICKEY END AS ASRTDTICKEY , CASE WHEN B.ASRTDTICKEY IS NOT NULL THEN C.ICNM END AS ASRTDTICNM , A.ASRTYN AS ASRTYN , CTG3.CTGNM AS LV1_CTGNM , CTG2.CTGNM AS LV2_CTGNM , CTG1.CTGNM AS LV3_CTGNM , A.PLCMDATE , A.EXPDATE , A.LCKEY , A.CNTRNO , COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(I.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_INN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_CTN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / (NULLIF(COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) * NULLIF(COALESCE(J.CPPQTY, 0), 0)), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_PLT , COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY * C.SLPRC, 0) AS CNFRMQTY_SLPRC , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_PLCM_DT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ASRT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ASRTDTICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ASRTMASICKEY = D.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG1 ON A.CTKEY = CTG1.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = CTG1.OWKEY AND C.CTGKEY = CTG1.CTGKEY AND CTG1.CTGLV = '3' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG2 ON CTG1.CTKEY = CTG2.CTKEY AND CTG1.OWKEY = CTG2.OWKEY AND CTG1.UPRCTGKEY = CTG2.CTGKEY AND CTG2.CTGLV = '2' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG3 ON CTG2.CTKEY = CTG3.CTKEY AND CTG2.OWKEY = CTG3.OWKEY AND CTG2.UPRCTGKEY = CTG3.CTGKEY AND CTG3.CTGLV = '1' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE I ON A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = I.OWKEY AND C.ICUNITKEY = I.ICUNITKEY AND I.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE J ON A.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = J.OWKEY AND C.ICUNITKEY = J.ICUNITKEY AND J.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey}
mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-iborderddln-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderPlcm - 입고 마감 적치 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY IBHDKEY, CAST(IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC), IBCFSEQNO, SEQNO

/* wms-inbound-iborderddln-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbOrderClaimReg - 클레임 등록 팝업 조회 */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , A.ASRTWKTGTYN AS ASRTYN , A.IBDTSTATUSCD , COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS EXPCTQTY , ROUND(A.EXPCTQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(C.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS EXPCTQTY_INN , ROUND(A.EXPCTQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS EXPCTQTY_CTN , ROUND(A.EXPCTQTY / (NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) * NULLIF(COALESCE(D.CPPQTY, 0), 0)), 2) AS EXPCTQTY_PLT , COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY * B.SLPRC, 0) AS EXPCTQTY_SLPRC
, COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS CNFRMQTY , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(C.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_INN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_CTN , ROUND(A.CNFRMQTY / (NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) * NULLIF(COALESCE(D.CPPQTY, 0), 0)), 2) AS CNFRMQTY_PLT , COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY * B.SLPRC, 0) AS CNFRMQTY_SLPRC
, COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0) AS NONCNFRMQTY , ROUND((COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(C.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS NONCNFRMQTY_INN , ROUND((COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0), 2) AS NONCNFRMQTY_CTN , ROUND((COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0)) / (NULLIF(COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) * NULLIF(COALESCE(D.CPPQTY, 0), 0)), 2) AS NONCNFRMQTY_PLT , COALESCE((COALESCE(A.EXPCTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(A.CNFRMQTY, 0)) * B.SLPRC, 0) AS NONCNFRMQTY_SLPRC
, CASE WHEN A.IBDTSTATUSCD = '91' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CLOSEYN , A.CLAIMRSNCONT , A.EXTORDERKEY , A.EXPORDERLINENO , A.ORHDKEY , A.ORDTKEY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = C.ICUNITKEY AND C.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = D.ICUNITKEY AND D.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTSTATUSCD <> '99' AND A.UPRIBDTKEY IS NULL AND A.EXPCTQTY <> A.CNFRMQTY ORDER BY A.IBHDKEY , CAST(A.IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC)
